meaning: n.[机]元件,机构,机关,机关报 [乐]风琴,管风琴,嗓音 [生物]器官
examples: The largest organ in the body is the liver.
The patient's immune system would reject the transplanted organ as a foreign object.
Organ donation to strangers is considered an unselfish act.
She was given the organ in a simultaneous operation on both women involving two surgeons.
In 2008, the UK's health ministers accepted the recommendations of the Organ Donation Taskforce.
